label: agent loop • append a section without dropping existing content
query: Append a new section to CHANGELOG.md: a line '## v1.1' followed by a line '- bug fixes'. Keep everything already in the file exactly as-is — do not delete or rewrite the v1.0 section.
notes: Pins additive editing: the model must extend a file while preserving prior content. The file assertions check BOTH the preserved v1.0 lines and the newly appended v1.1 lines survive, so a destructive overwrite (a common small-model failure) fails the case.
